verses.1: LORD, the God of my salvation,
verses.2: Let my prayer enter into your presence.
verses.3: For my soul is full of troubles.
verses.4: I am counted among those who go down into the pit.
verses.6: You have laid me in the lowest pit,
verses.7: Your wrath lies heavily on me.
verses.8: You have taken my friends from me.
verses.9: My eyes are dim from grief.
verses.10: Do you show wonders to the dead?
verses.11: Is your loving kindness declared in the grave?
verses.12: Are your wonders made known in the dark?
verses.13: But to you, LORD, I have cried.
verses.14: LORD, why do you reject my soul?
verses.15: I am afflicted and ready to die from my youth up.
verses.16: Your fierce wrath has gone over me.
verses.17: They came around me like water all day long.
verses.18: You have put lover and friend far from me,
